title: SCP Foundation
body:
# ALPHA
### EXPECT BUGS

(Last Worked On 20/02/2026 (DD/MM/YYYY))

SCP modpack for 1.12.2, has been simplified for optimal working with the SCP Foundation map bundled with this. Feel free to use this however you want, as long as credit is given!

I spent a long time working on this and eventually got stuck on something and left it, but im finally coming back around to it and seeing what i can do.

MOD LIST:
- CHISELS AND BITS - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisels-bits)
- CREATIVE CORE - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) OR [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creativecore)
- CRAYFISH FURNITURE MOD - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfish-furniture-mod)
- LITTLE TILES - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/littletiles)
- SCP CONTAINMENT PROTOCOL - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scp-containment-protocol-x)
- SCP LOCKDOWN - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/scp-lockdown) OR [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scp-lockdown)
- SCP OBSCURE - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scp-obscurity)
- SCP XK UNITY (Now SCP Overtime) - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/scp-overtime) OR [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scp-overtime/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20)
- SECURITY CRAFT - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft) OR [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/security-craft)
- ZERAS SCPS - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zeras-scps)
